title: Water Scarcity in South Asia: A Dynamic Computable General Equilibrium Analysis

summary.about: The long-run economy-wide consequences of worsening water scarcity across South Asia.
summary.method: Combines dynamic and comparative-static CGE models under different assumptions about replacing water with other inputs.
summary.insights: Without better water productivity, potential 2030 GDP losses could range from 7% to 45%, with strong food-price effects.
